Label: FR-U-30
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for imported neural networks
Correction: The system shall limit the file size of imported neural networks to a maximum of 100MB.

Label: FR-U-60
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for input images
Correction: The system shall limit the file size of input images to a maximum of 10MB.

Label: FR-U-30
Issue: Does not define the response to unsupported file formats for neural networks
Correction: The system shall display an error message if an unsupported neural network file format is selected.

Label: FR-U-60
Issue: Does not define the response to unsupported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall display an error message if an unsupported input image file format is selected.

Correction: Include diagrams that illustrate the system architecture and data flow.
